recipe.title: Vegan gravy
recipe.description: Vegan roast dinner ideas can be a bit tricky, but this vegan gravy recipe will be an absolute scene-stealer. Great with a tasty nut roast.

steps.descr: Peel the onions, wash the carrots, roughly chop with the...
steps.instructions: Peel the onions, wash the carrots, roughly chop with the celery and place in a large pan on a high heat with 1 tablespoon of oil. Fry for 25 minutes, or until turning golden, stirring occasionally.

on_enter.say: Peel the onions, wash the carrots, roughly chop with the celery and place in a large pan on a high heat with 1 tablespoon of oil. Fry for 25 minutes, or until turning golden, stirring occasionally.

steps.descr: Place the dried porcini in a large jug and cover with 1 to 1
steps.instructions: Place the dried porcini in a large jug and cover with 1 to 1.5 litres of boiling kettle water. Add the yeast extract and half the herbs, crumble in the stock cubes, and set aside to infuse.

on_enter.say: Place the dried porcini in a large jug and cover with 1 to 1.5 litres of boiling kettle water. Add the yeast extract and half the herbs, crumble in the stock cubes, and set aside to infuse.

steps.descr: Add the port, jam and remaining herbs to the pan and...
steps.instructions: Add the port, jam and remaining herbs to the pan and cook for a further 5 minutes, or until sticky and caramelised. Stir in the tomato purée, then the flour and red wine vinegar.

on_enter.say: Add the port, jam and remaining herbs to the pan and cook for a further 5 minutes, or until sticky and caramelised. Stir in the tomato purée, then the flour and red wine vinegar.

steps.descr: Pour the stock and porcini into the pan, discarding just...
steps.instructions: Pour the stock and porcini into the pan, discarding just the last gritty bit, bring to the boil, then reduce to a simmer for around 10 minutes, or until thickened and reduced to the consistency of your liking.

on_enter.say: Pour the stock and porcini into the pan, discarding just the last gritty bit, bring to the boil, then reduce to a simmer for around 10 minutes, or until thickened and reduced to the consistency of your liking.

steps.descr: Ladle the contents of the pan into a blender, discarding...
steps.instructions: Ladle the contents of the pan into a blender, discarding the chunky herbs, blitz until very smooth, then pour it back into the pan through a coarse sieve, using the back of a spoon to push through all that lovely flavour.

on_enter.say: Ladle the contents of the pan into a blender, discarding the chunky herbs, blitz until very smooth, then pour it back into the pan through a coarse sieve, using the back of a spoon to push through all that lovely flavour.

steps.descr: Taste and season to perfection, cool to room...
steps.instructions: Taste and season to perfection, cool to room temperature, then pour into containers or bags and pop into the fridge or freezer, ready to finish off on Christmas Day.

on_enter.say: Taste and season to perfection, cool to room temperature, then pour into containers or bags and pop into the fridge or freezer, ready to finish off on Christmas Day.

steps.descr: On the day, if frozen, take the gravy out to defrost...
steps.instructions: On the day, if frozen, take the gravy out to defrost when your roast goes into the oven, then simply heat through in a pan until piping hot, ready to serve.

on_enter.say: On the day, if frozen, take the gravy out to defrost when your roast goes into the oven, then simply heat through in a pan until piping hot, ready to serve.
